Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-60081 affecting package perl-DBI for versions less than 1.651-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-60081 affecting package perl-DBI for versions less than 1.651-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.
